quote: I just wanted to thank you for the planting layout and let you know how wonderful it came out. The yard is so full of color and pollinators already and we're still early in the spring. It gets complimented a ton by passerby's and we absolutely love how it has matured.
author: Rana D.

quote: A wonderful personalities with wonderful passion and ideas of work. The citizens of Cyprus are lucky because they have owners of green Cyprus.
author: G.S Chahal

quote: Green Planet Landscaping and Gardening Cyprus are a lovely family run business made up of close brothers who are highly skilled professionals, extremely talented and hard working.
author: Andrea M.

quote: The experience is fabulous. The genuine individuals they are, jolly nature, caring and love towards plants, good communication skills and working skills they have.
author: Rupinder C.
